title: Canvas vs SVG
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Web Fundamentals
description: Interactive MicroSim comparing Canvas (raster) and SVG (vector) rendering models across drawing, scaling, interaction, and performance dimensions.

learningObjectives: Compare the Canvas and SVG rendering models by observing how each handles drawing, scaling, and interaction

keyQuestions: Why does Canvas produce blocky artifacts when zoomed but SVG does not?
When would you choose Canvas over SVG for an interactive infographic?
How does SVG support hover events without extra JavaScript?
commonMisconceptions: SVG is always better than Canvas
Canvas cannot handle user interaction at all
SVG and Canvas produce identical visual output
assessmentOpportunities: Students identify three differences between Canvas and SVG
Students recommend the correct technology for a given infographic scenario
